chunks.title: Introduction and Call to Hosea
chunks.reason: Establishes the historical context and introduces the divine command for Hosea's symbolic marriage.

chunks.title: Birth of Jezreel
chunks.reason: Narrates the birth of the first son and the oracle explaining his name as a judgment on the house of Jehu.

chunks.title: Birth of Lo-ruhamah
chunks.reason: Describes the birth of the daughter and the oracle declaring God's withheld compassion on Israel while promising it for Judah.

chunks.title: Birth of Lo-ammi
chunks.reason: Records the birth of the third child and the oracle declaring the broken covenant relationship between God and Israel.

chunks.title: Restoration of Israel and Judah
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with a prophetic promise of restoration, numbering, and unity for both kingdoms.
